title: Keely Sympathetic Transfer PASS: 7 laws mapped to QA reachability and path structure
_fixture_purpose: Certifies Keely's 7 sympathetic transfer laws (Category 2, Vibes framework) as QA reachability mappings. Sympathetic oscillation = orbit co-membership; discordance = reachability obstruction. Vibes: QA reachability obstruction = SVP failure of sympathetic access.

5.name: Law of Transmissive Vibraic Energy
5.keely_text: All oscillating and vibrating coherent aggregates create outwardly propagated concentric waves
5.qa_mapping: Generator application propagates state changes through orbit; each step (b,e)->(e,d) is a discrete wave

6.name: Law of Sympathetic Oscillation
6.keely_text: Coherent aggregates immersed in a medium pulsating at their natural pitch simultaneously oscillate
6.qa_mapping: States sharing the same orbit are entrained by the generator; co-membership enables coupling

7.name: Law of Attraction
7.keely_text: Juxtaposed coherent aggregates vibrating in unison or harmonic ratio are mutually attracted
7.qa_mapping: States with concordant tuple resonance (high einsum coupling) attract; same orbit = unison

8.name: Law of Repulsion
8.keely_text: Juxtaposed coherent aggregates vibrating in discord are mutually repelled
8.qa_mapping: Cross-orbit states with discordant f-values have no shared path = reachability obstruction

17.name: Law of Transformation of Forces
17.keely_text: All forces are different forms of Universal Energy unlike in their period-frequency, merging into each other by imperceptible increments; each form representing the compass of 21 octaves
17.qa_mapping: Three orbit families are different forms of the same modular arithmetic; 21 octaves = 7x3 septenary x triune

37.name: Law of Electro-Chemical Equivalents
37.keely_text: An atom vibrates sympathetically under electric energy, absorbing undertones that are harmonic of the electric pitch
37.qa_mapping: Selective absorption = only states with harmonically related f-values respond; orbit-selective coupling

40.name: Law of Electric Conductivity
40.keely_text: Electric energy transmitted through homogeneous bodies in direct proportion as atoms are perfect harmonics
40.qa_mapping: Transmission efficiency proportional to harmonic perfection = coupling coefficient magnitude

reachability_examples.description: Satellite states reachable within satellite orbit

obstruction_examples.description: Cosmos cannot reach singularity (Law 8: discord = repulsion)
obstruction_examples.reason: Different orbit families: COSMOS vs SINGULARITY
Different orbit families: SATELLITE vs COSMOS

triad_condition.description: Vibes three-body concordance: cause-medium-receiver must all be concordant
triad_condition.qa_interpretation: In QA, generator IS the state: (b,e) generates (e,d) generates (d,a). Each state is simultaneously cause, medium, and receiver. The arithmetic relationships ARE the transmission.
triad_condition.deeper_rule: Any two of 21 named QA elements reconstruct all 21 — the medium is any two-element window into the integer structure

witnesses.note: Each step is a discrete wave (Law 5); co-membership enables it (Law 6)
Law 7: concordant states attract; Law 8: discordant states repel

witnesses.description: Three forms of the same generator operation
witnesses.transmissive: COSMOS — generator propagation through state space
witnesses.attractive: SATELLITE — resonance coupling between co-orbital states
witnesses.note: Law 17: three manifestations, 21 octaves = 7x3 = septenary x triune
Law 37: only harmonic f-values respond; Law 40: efficiency proportional to alignment

cross_references.name: QA Keely Structural Ratio Cert
cross_references.relation: Sibling: structural invariants that transfer laws operate on
